intake_questions.text: Has the organisation previously held ISO 27001 certification?
Is there a dedicated Information Security team or CISO role?
Has a formal risk assessment been conducted in the last 12 months?
Does the organisation have a documented Information Security Policy?
Are information security objectives formally defined and tracked?

scope_template.prompt: Define the ISMS scope — departments, sites, and functions in scope
List primary information assets and supporting systems in ISMS scope
Document any Annex A controls excluded with justification

requirements.text: The organisation must have defined the ISMS scope, identified interested parties and their requirements, and documented the internal/external issues affecting the ISMS.
requirements.evidence_expectation: ISMS scope statement; stakeholder register; context of organisation document

requirements.text: A documented risk assessment process must exist and have been applied to produce a current risk register with treatment decisions and residual risk acceptance.
requirements.evidence_expectation: Risk assessment methodology; risk register with risk owners; risk treatment plan; risk acceptance records

requirements.text: An Information Security Policy and supporting topic-specific policies must be documented, management-approved, and communicated to all relevant personnel.
requirements.evidence_expectation: Information security policy suite; management approval evidence; staff acknowledgement records

requirements.text: A vulnerability management process must be in place including regular scanning, tracked remediation, and SLAs aligned to severity.
requirements.evidence_expectation: Vulnerability scan reports (last 3 months); patch management policy; remediation tracking evidence

requirements.text: A cryptography policy defining approved algorithms, key lengths, and key management procedures must be implemented.
requirements.evidence_expectation: Cryptography policy; encryption implementation evidence; key management procedure; key rotation records

requirements.text: Access control rules based on least-privilege and need-to-know must be documented, with periodic access reviews conducted and evidenced.
requirements.evidence_expectation: Access control policy; access request and approval records; quarterly access review results; role-based access matrix

evidence_requests.title: ISMS Scope and Context Documentation
evidence_requests.description: ISMS scope statement, stakeholder/interested-party register, and issues register (internal/external context)

evidence_requests.title: Risk Register and Treatment Plan
evidence_requests.description: Current risk register with likelihood/impact ratings, risk owners, and documented treatment decisions

evidence_requests.title: Information Security Policy Suite
evidence_requests.description: Top-level IS policy and supporting topic-specific policies with management approval signatures and distribution evidence

evidence_requests.title: Vulnerability Scan Reports and Remediation Tracker
evidence_requests.description: Last 3 months of vulnerability scan reports and corresponding remediation tracking with SLA compliance evidence

evidence_requests.title: Cryptography Policy and Implementation Evidence
evidence_requests.description: Cryptography policy, evidence of approved algorithm usage, and key management procedure with rotation records

evidence_requests.title: Access Control Policy and Review Evidence
evidence_requests.description: Access control policy, sample access request/approval records, and most recent formal access review results

task_templates.title: Review ISMS scope statement and context documentation
Assess risk assessment methodology against ISO 27001 Clause 6 requirements
Audit information security policy suite for completeness
Evaluate vulnerability management process and SLA adherence
Assess cryptography policy and key management implementation
Test access control process including access review evidence
Interview CISO/IS Manager on ISMS governance and objectives
Perform Statement of Applicability (SoA) gap analysis against Annex A

finding_templates.title_pattern: Risk assessment missing or not current for {asset_or_process}
Access review not conducted within required period for {system}
Critical vulnerability remediation SLA breached on {system}

severity_model.critical: Control absence or fundamental ISMS failure; major non-conformity likely at certification audit
severity_model.high: Significant control gap; minor non-conformity at certification audit likely
severity_model.medium: Control weakness requiring improvement; opportunity for corrective action
severity_model.low: Minor gap or enhancement opportunity; recommendation for continual improvement
severity_model.informational: Best-practice observation with no direct non-conformity impact

advisory_clinic_templates.title: Risk Assessment Workshop
advisory_clinic_templates.guidance: Facilitate risk identification and rating session with asset owners; produce draft risk register

advisory_clinic_templates.title: Statement of Applicability Review
advisory_clinic_templates.guidance: Walk through all Annex A controls; document applicability and implementation status

advisory_clinic_templates.title: Policy Gap Remediation Advisory
advisory_clinic_templates.guidance: Identify missing policies; provide templates aligned to ISO 27001 requirements
